name: Fourth of July Flag Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yellow Or Chocolate Cake Mix
3 cups Whipping Cream (DO NOT use whipped topping or aerosol can)
recipeInstructions:
Yield: 12 Servings
Bake the cake according to the directions (Use the high altitude directions if needed), in a 9 X 13-inch pan. Cool.
(Cake may be made ahead and frozen.)
Place on a serving plate or board.
Whip the cream with the confectioners sugar.
Cut the strawberries into halves lengthwise.
Spread the cream evenly around the sides of the cake, saving a little for the top.
To decorate:
Using a pastry bag, pipe (or dollop and spread with a spatula) rows of cream alternating with rows of strawberries for the flag "stripes".
Make a background of the blueberries in the upper left-hand corner.
Pipe or dollop stars on top to create the "star" section of the cake.
If making the cake ahead, arrange fruit several hours before serving.
Add the cream up to an hour before serving.
